nasb.text: Transgression speaks to the ungodly within his heart; There is no fear of God before his eyes.

esv.text: Transgression speaks to the wicked deep in his heart; there is no fear of God before his eyes.

cnv.text: 惡人的罪過在他心中深處說話， 他眼中也不怕　神。

ccb.text: 罪恶在恶人内心深处说话， 他们眼中毫无对上帝的畏惧。

csbs.text: 论到恶人的罪过，我心里有这样的话语： “他的眼中没有对神的敬畏；
